# Source

- Upstream: https://github.com/openclaw/acpx/tree/bd85a5ac4e3db340d9967f299d629758d8451fc8/skills/acpx
- APM dependency: `openclaw/acpx/skills/acpx`
- Ref: `bd85a5ac4e3db340d9967f299d629758d8451fc8`
- License: MIT (© openclaw; see https://github.com/openclaw/acpx/blob/main/LICENSE).
- Notes: Companion to the `acpx` CLI installed via mise (`npm:acpx`); it is a headless ACP client, not a subagent. Custom model shortcuts (`agpt`/`aopus`/`agemini`) live in `~/.acpx/config.json` and require `cursor-agent` on PATH. See ~/.agents/docs/acpx.md.
